agent_stats.outcome_reasoning: The site was identified as land east of Market Place in Loddon, Norfolk. Page 2 provided a clear 1:2500 scale map with a red boundary and hatching. The match at the Loddon town centre coordinates (52.5354, 1.4812) was exceptionally strong, yielding 834 inliers, perfect road name agreement (Market Place, High Street, Old Mill Loke), and high scale consistency (0.98). This confirms the precise location and extent of the planning boundary.
